accurate.why: All claims match the bill text and the CRA disapproval mechanism is correctly described.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; chapter 8 of title 5 is the Congressional Review Act, accurately referenced.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as disapproving and nullifying the DOE water heater rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the resolution invalidates a DOE rule under chapter 8 of title 5 (CRA).

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no exceptions or conditions, as the summary correctly notes.

effective_dates.why: The bill specifies no effective dates or sunsets beyond approval; legislative dates are accurately reported.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential effect that the rule shall have no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and descriptive without editorializing.

correct_entities.why: Department of Energy, the rule title, and the CRA reference are all correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The December 26, 2024 publication date and the House/Senate/approval dates are all accurate.
